name: Pocket Pyro
blurb: Design your own fireworks show — tap the sky, pick burst styles, unleash the finale.

name: Orbit Runner
blurb: One-tap arcade: reverse your orbit to dodge red arcs and snag gold sparks as the ring speeds up.

name: FairShare
blurb: Split any bill by what each person actually ordered — tax and tip divided proportionally, pennies always add up.

name: TimeBridge
blurb: Pick your cities, see everyone's waking hours side by side, and tap the starred hour that works for all.
